query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black and white profile portrait of a person in silhouette against a bright background. The dark form occupies the left side of the frame, revealing the curved outline of the nose, lips, and chin where it meets the light. The background shifts from light gray near the silhouette to white toward the right edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white profile portrait employing extreme underexposure to render a person as a solid black silhouette against a bright background. The crushed shadows eliminate all facial detail, reducing the subject to a graphic outline where only the curved contour of the nose, lips, and chin remains visible against a smooth gradient of light.
